title: WolfTpmSwtpm::drop missing SAFETY comment
description: In wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs, the Drop impl for WolfTpmSwtpm (lines 185-191) contains an unsafe block calling wolfTPM2_Cleanup but has no SAFETY comment. The sibling WolfTpmLinuxDev::drop (lines 94-101) has the comment: 'SAFETY: dev was initialised by wolfTPM2_Init; cleanup is idempotent.' Add the same comment to WolfTpmSwtpm::drop for consistency and to explain the invariant being upheld.
